configurations.name: app
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exec npm run dev

configurations.name: website
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exec npm --prefix ../smplmark-website run dev

configurations.name: website-remote
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exec npm --prefix ../smplmark-website run dev:remote
